effect.name: bounce
effect.description: JavaScript-driven bounce (Web Animations API). Tests the JS-hook path. Best as a build.
effect.aiSpec: Element springs in from above, overshoots, and bounces a few times before settling; leave drops it downward. There is also a lively in-place emphasis bounce. Best as a build (enter, exit, or emphasis) for playful, attention-getting reveals. Avoid as a whole-slide transition for serious content; choose it when you want energy and personality rather than a calm, neutral motion.

snippet.label: Build: bounce (JS)
snippet.description: Reveal a range with a JS-driven bounce.
